name: comment-mutation-shapes
description: Comment mutations (Flows 4-6) follow the same createMutation shape as annotation mutations. Flow 4 (create): onSuccess invalidation only. Flows 5-6 (delete/resolve): optimistic update in onMutate + rollback in onError + invalidation in onSettled. The onMutate context type ({ previous }) must be typed explicitly — TS does not infer it from createMutation automatically.
A linter/formatter hook reverted AnnotationPanel.svelte to pre-Chunk-3 state mid-session when git stash was used during a build check.
resolution: Re-apply all changes after the revert is detected, then git stash drop (not pop). Never git stash during mid-chunk work — use a temp commit instead.

name: feature-mutation-wiring
description: Feature mutations in DrawingToolbar use createMutation at top-level script scope. featureUpsertMutation.current.mutateAsync() is used in saveFeature and undo/redo handlers. onSuccess invalidates queryKeys.features.list({layerId}) to refresh GeoJSON sources.
@tanstack/svelte-query v6 createMutation returns object with direct .mutateAsync() — .current accessor is React pattern, does not exist on Svelte Query mutations
resolution: Remove .current from mutation calls. Use mutation.mutateAsync() directly, matching AnnotationPanel and GeoprocessingPanel patterns.
